issues.description: Activated effect missing required condition: must specify 'Rest' action as cost before KO action. Current DSL shows only KO, but card text states 'You may rest this Character' as the activation cost.
Action type 'PlayFromHand' is incorrect. Card effect adds card from trash to hand, not plays from hand. Should be 'ReturnToHand' or similar retrieve action.
Missing source specification: action should specify retrieving from trash, not from hand. Current filter lacks trash source context.
